sourceSummary.oneLine: Part list/BOM for HAD1417MCW, including CsI Type assembly items and Accessory items.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports device configuration and design history traceability by listing assemblies, materials, ERP codes, drawing numbers, revisions, specifications, suppliers, units, and quantities.
keyPoints: The source identifies the product name as HAD1417MCW and includes a CsI Type part list.
The source includes detector, front cover, back cover, middle block, panel, packaging, USB, accessory, and option items.
Most listed item revision numbers are 0.
Accessory items include battery, power cord, detector power box, recharger, recharger adaptor, hand switch, and optional Proposition 65 warning label.

evidence.claim: The document is a part list for HAD1417MCW.
The part list includes a CsI Type section.
The part list includes an Accessory section.
HAD1417MCW Detector Set Ass'y is listed with ERP/drawing code AMI90-02575E and revision 0.
HAD1417MCW Detector Ass'y is listed with code AC0-000013 and revision 0.
The BOM includes FRONT_COVER_ASSY with code AC0-000012 and revision 0.
The BOM includes MIDDLE_BLOCK_ASSY with code AC0-000011 and revision 0.
The BOM includes 1417 CsI_PANEL_ASSY with code AMI99-01267A and revision 0.
The TFT sensor panel is listed as AMI59-01110A with specification FM3543S-D6S/A;440x520 ±0.6mm and supplier Innolux.
The Accessory section includes a Li-ion Polymer battery rated 3400mAh.
The accessory detector power box is a DEPS9601 B-Type AC/DC 48W power supply with AC220V input and DC16V output.
